title: Make hover-only controls discoverable on touch devices
description: Convert hover-revealed action buttons, metadata, and shortcut affordances into touch-visible states using coarse-pointer media variants so tablet and phone users can discover controls without a mouse.

title: Prevent mobile input zoom and nested-scroll pull-to-refresh conflicts
description: Add baseline mobile CSS for native selects, form controls, and route containers so text inputs do not trigger iOS zoom and inner scroll regions do not bubble overscroll to the browser shell.

title: Move viewport screenshot smoke artifacts to ignored report storage
description: Relocate ad-hoc viewport screenshot scripts and generated PNGs out of the tracked workspace tree, then add a documented ignored report path for future visual smoke checks.

title: Add CSS-specific validation for responsive utility changes
description: Introduce a lightweight CSS/style validation command because ESLint does not validate src/styles.css, making responsive media-query regressions easy to miss.

title: Reconcile feature/chat-ui-improvements with origin/main
description: Resolve branch divergence so verified responsive UI commits can merge cleanly instead of repeatedly deploying from a long-lived local feature branch.

title: Baseline and reduce strict conditional lint debt in responsive UI files
description: Compare changed-file lint against a clean base and remove pre-existing @typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition findings from high-traffic UI files so future visual polish can use stricter gates.
